title: Login Authentication Error
description: User unable to access dashboard due to 401 Unauthorized error on valid credentials.

title: Payment Gateway Timeout
description: Stripe integration failing at the final checkout step for international cards.

title: Profile Picture Upload Fail
description: Users report that JPEG images larger than 2MB are being rejected without error messages.

title: Incorrect Invoice Totals
description: The PDF invoice generated shows the pre-tax amount instead of the total amount.

title: Dark Mode Toggle Bug
description: Switching to dark mode does not change the background color of the sidebar.

title: Password Reset Link Expired
description: Password reset emails are arriving with links that are already invalid.

title: Slow Dashboard Loading
description: Initial data fetch for the main dashboard takes over 8 seconds.

title: Missing Search Filter
description: The filter by date range is missing from the transaction history page.

title: API Documentation Access
description: Developer portal is returning a 404 for the API endpoints documentation page.

title: Mobile Responsiveness Issue
description: Navbar overlaps with the banner on iPhone 13 screen sizes.

title: Broken Links in Footer
description: The Privacy Policy link leads to a blank page.

title: Duplicate Notification Alerts
description: Users receive the same push notification three times per event.

title: Database Connection Leak
description: Service crashes periodically due to too many open connections.

title: Email Subject Encoding
description: Special characters in the subject line appear as garbled text.

title: Translation Error - Spanish
description: The 'Submit' button is incorrectly translated as 'Enviar' in some sections.

title: Bulk Upload Failure
description: CSV upload fails when the file contains more than 100 rows.

title: White Screen on Startup
description: Some Safari users report a white screen upon loading the application.

title: Export to Excel Missing Data
description: The 'Notes' column is empty in the exported Excel file.

title: Icon Alignment Issue
description: The 'New Ticket' icon is slightly shifted to the right in the sidebar.

title: Session Timeout Too Short
description: Users are being logged out after only 5 minutes of inactivity.
